input.command:
python3 -c "
import json
fname = 'articles/2026/02/19/articles.jsonl'
kws = ['ice hockey gold', 'ice hockey final', 'men ice hockey', 'winter olympics closing', 'medal count', 'afghan', 'greek island', 'migrant', 'france ambassador', 'iran nuclear', 'geneva', 'champions league', 'manchester united', 'chelsea', 'state of union']
with open(fname) as f:
    for line in f:
        art = json.loads(line)
        title = (art.get('title','') or '').lower()
        for kw in kws:
            if kw in title:
                print(f'[{kw}] {(art.get(\"title\",\"\") or \"\")[:120]}')
                break
" 2>/dev/null | head -40
